global.title: Custom GraphQL scalars in Powerhouse use Zod schemas for validation and must be registered in seven places in scalars.ts
global.content: Custom scalars are created in `src/scalars/graphql/` of the document-engineering project. Each scalar file exports: `type` (TS type as string), `typedef` (GraphQL definition e.g. `'scalar PhoneNumber'`), `schema` (Zod validation), `stringSchema` (string representation for code generation), `config` (GraphQLScalarTypeConfig with name, description, serialize/parseValue/parseLiteral), and `scalar` (GraphQLScalarType instance). Registration in `scalars.ts` requires updating seven sections: namespace imports, type exports, export object, customScalars record, resolvers, typeDefs array, generatorTypeDefs, and validationSchema. Scalars can be integrated into React components by using `scalar.schema.safeParse(value)` for validation, enabling consistent frontend/backend validation.
global.description: Each scalar exports type, typedef, schema (Zod), stringSchema, config, and scalar; registered across imports, types, exports, resolvers, typeDefs.
